meme.title: Want to get medieval on your cat?

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Evil and intimidating cat
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Markets React To: I think he knows
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Opinion: When the customer asks for the manager and it’s actually you (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Scratching via Bluetooth"
